article.title: How to Reset User Password
article.description: Steps to securely reset a user's Active Directory password.
article.solution: 1. Verify identity. 2. Open AD Users and Computers. 3. Right-click user -> Reset Password. 4. Check 'User must change password at next logon'.

article.title: Fixing VPN Connection Timeout
article.description: Troubleshooting steps for when the Cisco AnyConnect VPN times out.
article.solution: 1. Check internet connection. 2. Flush DNS (ipconfig /flushdns). 3. Restart VPN service. 4. Verify MFA prompt approval.

article.title: Blue Screen Error 0x0000003B
article.solution: 1. Boot into Safe Mode. 2. Update display drivers. 3. Run sfc /scannow. 4. Check for recent Windows Updates.
